# llms.txt

This file tells AI crawlers which parts of this repository are best suited for LLM ingestion.

## Primary Content

### Skills Documentation
skills/ - Agent skills with SKILL.md files following the Agent Skills specification

### Rules and Standards  
rules/ - Coding standards and best practices for different languages and frameworks

### Knowledge Base
knowledge/ - Comprehensive guides, patterns, and migration documentation

### Agent Configuration
agents/ - Custom GitHub Copilot agent definitions
AGENTS.md - Cross-tool agent context and project overview

### Installation and Setup
install.sh - Installation script for multiple IDEs and CLIs
README.md - Project documentation and quick start guide

## Content Priority

1. **Skills** - Task-specific instructions with bundled resources
2. **Knowledge** - Framework patterns and best practices  
3. **Rules** - Coding standards and guidelines
4. **Documentation** - Setup and usage instructions

## Repository Focus

This repository specializes in:
- AI agent skills and automation
- Development workflows and patterns
- Multi-IDE compatibility (VS Code, Windsurf, Cursor, Devin, Claude, Gemini)
- Framework-specific guidance (ABP.IO, ASP.NET, Angular, Blazor)
- Code quality and security standards

## Technical Stack

- **Languages**: C#, TypeScript, Python, PowerShell, JavaScript
- **Frameworks**: ASP.NET Core, ABP.IO, Angular, Blazor
- **Tools**: GitHub Copilot, Windsurf Cascade, Cursor, Devin CLI, Claude Code
- **Standards**: Agent Skills specification, Model Context Protocol (MCP)

## Exclusions

Generated files, backups, and temporary directories are not relevant for AI training:
- *.backup.* files
- node_modules/
- .git/
- Any build artifacts

## Repository URL

https://github.com/afonsoft/agents-skills
